title: pimelea altior
intro: Pimelea altior, also known as Mountain Rice Flower, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern region of Western Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pimelea altior include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
